---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for FreelanceOS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
